subcodes.first_line: Thy letter hath reached Him Who hath been wronged, which telleth of thy turning unto God and thy detachment from all else save Him. We beseech [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد حضر لدی المظلوم کتابک الذی یحکی عن توجهک الی الله و انقطاعک عما سواه نسئل
subcodes.subjects: @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @knowledge; recognition of God
